game intro: step 1.text:
Let's set the scene:

You are an adventurer, and in this day you have finally reached your destination.

In front of you there is ...

ops.text:
... A huge cave.

Where the dragon I have been folowing is located,
if the rumors are to be believed.

... An imposing castle.

The same one that has been ocupied by the deadly dragon for the last five years.

game scene: step 2.text:
Your journey was not easy, and lot's of times you thought about 
giving up.

But every time, 
you go back to, 
"that day".

ops.text:
Every time I remember that day, my blood boils.

(Path of resolution)

The single memory of that day is enough to send shivers down my spine.

(Path of fear)

game intro: step 3.text:
That day... That dreadful day when the dragon destroyed your fields.

The hard work of generation in your family turned to charcoal.

And the imposing dragon standing in front of you...

ops.text:
I'll never forget!

How could I...

The size of her pussy was enough to swallow my whole head...

I'll never forget!

How could I...

His dick was as long as myself and warm as a chimney...

game intro: step 4.text:
Enough of that!

Stop daydreaming, clean the drool from your face. 

You must start right away with your objective!

Meet that dragon face to face again!

ops.text:
YES!

I won't stop for anything!

I believe I made a mistake.   
Could we start over?
